description: Reads the SSH config file and returns configured host aliases, hostnames, and ports as structured data.
Returns the octal permission mode, owner, and group for the specified file path.
Performs a DNS lookup and returns resolved IP addresses for both A and AAAA records.
Parses a database connection URI and returns components: host, port, database name, username.
Lists environment variables matching a given prefix or regex pattern with their current values.
Makes an HTTP GET request and returns the status code, response headers, and body.
Scans localhost ports in a given range and reports which ones have active listeners.
Parses a .env file and returns key-value pairs, handling comments, quotes, and multiline values.
Returns SSH public key metadata: key type, bit length, SHA256 fingerprint, and comment field.
Decodes a JWT header and payload sections, returning the claims as structured data.
Connects to a hostname, completes the TLS handshake, and returns the certificate chain details.
Validates a YAML or JSON file against a provided JSON Schema and lists any errors found.
Reads a Dockerfile and returns parsed base image, exposed ports, volumes, entrypoint, and ENV directives.
Generates a random string suitable for use as a password or API key, with configurable character classes.
Compares two directory trees by file presence, size, and modification time, reporting differences.
Fetches an OpenAPI spec from a URL and returns a summary of endpoints, methods, and schemas.
Reports network interface names, IP addresses, subnet masks, MAC addresses, and link status.
Parses SQL CREATE TABLE statements and produces an entity-relationship summary.
Reads a Kubernetes YAML manifest and extracts resource definitions with images, limits, and mounts.
Calculates SHA-256 checksums for files in a directory, returning per-file and aggregate hashes.
